message:
fix(ci): VCR env override uses tombstone for unset vars

The test env override map now stores Option<String> instead of String.
When a test sets an env var to None (unset), a tombstone (None) is stored
in the override map, preventing fallthrough to the real process environment.

Previously, unsetting removed the override entry, so env_var() fell through
to std::env::var() which returned CI=true in the CI environment, causing
default_mode_no_ci_is_auto and cascading PoisonError failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
